notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Logan Gilbert picks off Jose Altuve at 1st on throw to first baseman Josh Naylor.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes grounds into a double play, third baseman Brendan Donovan to first baseman Josh Naylor. Jose Altuve out at 3rd. Isaac Paredes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes grounds into a double play, third baseman Brendan Donovan to first baseman Josh Naylor. Jose Altuve out at 3rd. Isaac Paredes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor plunked
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor hit by pitch. Julio Rodríguez to 2nd.
